evals.prompt: Convert this raw release notes output into Serverless changelog format for March 23, 2026. File is at ./raw-serverless-rn.md. Use gh to fetch PR context and docs-content release-notes/elastic-cloud-serverless for style.
evals.expected_output: A single fenced Markdown code block with ## March 23, 2026 [serverless-changelog-03232026], two ### sections (Features and enhancements, Fixes) with correct anchors, asterisk bullets with verb-first phrasing and {{kib-pull}}/{{es-pull}} PR links, plus a Notes (Confidence + Assumptions) section.
expectations: Output contains exactly one ## header and two ### headers in the required order
Anchors follow serverless-changelog-MMDDYYYY pattern with zero-padded date
Bullets start with active verbs (Adds, Fixes, Improves, etc.) in present tense
Notes section explicitly calls out low-confidence bullets or assumptions
No component sub-headings from the tool (e.g. Discover, Management) appear in the output

evals.prompt: Convert this serverless release notes that includes new Azure region announcements (East US 2, Germany West Central) and some items without PR numbers. File at ./raw-rn-regions.md for April 15, 2026.
evals.expected_output: Serverless changelog with region announcements using nested bullet lists, items without PR numbers formatted as standalone bullets, and Notes flagging entries without PR context.
expectations: Region announcements use nested asterisk bullet lists
Entries without PR numbers do not include a [#]({{...}}) link
Notes section mentions missing PR numbers or reduced confidence where applicable
Uses {{serverless-full}} variable for Elastic Cloud Serverless references

evals.prompt: Check the formatting of our existing Serverless changelog and suggest improvements.
evals.expected_output: Skill does NOT review existing changelog content; it is for converting raw release notes tool output into Serverless changelog format. User asked for review, not conversion.
expectations: Does NOT output a full ## Date [serverless-changelog-MMDDYYYY] block with Features and Fixes
Either declines or suggests using the correct task; does not treat this as a raw RN conversion request

evals.prompt: The raw tool output has a 'Breaking changes' section and a 'Known issues' section alongside features and fixes. Convert it to Serverless changelog format for May 1, 2026.
evals.expected_output: Changelog with only Features and enhancements and Fixes sections; breaking changes and known issues mapped into those two sections, with mapping decisions explained in Notes.
expectations: Output has only two ### sections: Features and enhancements, then Fixes
No ### Breaking changes or ### Known issues headings appear
Notes section records how unexpected sections were mapped
Product variables like {{esql}}, {{fleet}}, {{agent}} used where appropriate
